evals.name: dotfiles-arch-review
evals.prompt: Analyze this codebase for architectural improvements
evals.expected_output: A structured report with findings across coupling, complexity, state, duplication, errors, and structure dimensions. Should detect stow-based architecture, identify any organizational issues, and note what's working well.

assertions.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a dotfiles/stow-based repo
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
Report includes a 'what's working well' section
Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
Findings are ranked or prioritized
At least 2 findings include concrete suggestions

evals.name: crm-web-tech-debt
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive tech debt report for a Rails web app. Should detect Rails stack, use git history for churn analysis, find coupling issues in models/controllers, and produce prioritized findings with file paths and evidence.

assertions.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a Ruby on Rails application
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
Report includes a 'what's working well' section
Findings reference specific file paths and line numbers
Report includes git churn or change frequency data
Findings are ranked or prioritized with severity levels
Report notes when multiple agents flagged the same area
At least 3 findings include concrete improvement directions

evals.name: partner-proto-shape
evals.prompt: what's the overall shape of this project?
evals.expected_output: An architectural overview of an unfamiliar codebase. Should detect the stack, map the major components, identify patterns in use, and give a clear picture of the system's structure without prior context.

assertions.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies the project's tech stack
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
Report includes a 'what's working well' section
Report gives a clear picture of major components and relationships
Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
Report would help a new developer understand the codebase
